summary: Confirmed Zed supports secondary- modifier (cmd on macOS, ctrl on Linux/Windows). Of 17 custom bindings, only 4 can safely migrate to secondary- (ctrl-?, ctrl-shift-e, ctrl-shift-c, ctrl-enter). 5 have fatal/serious macOS collisions (ctrl-h/l/o/i/q) and must remain ctrl-. 5 use alt- and are unaffected. ctrl-shift-a and ctrl->/< should also stay as ctrl-.

artifacts.summary: Full collision analysis of all 17 custom keybindings against Zed macOS/Linux defaults, with secondary- migration recommendations
